behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff between summary-write path and findings storage/query for the same round. Unit tests on a single validator can miss join/filter/state bugs across repository + gate service. Rejected System because behavior text is only about "stored ... finding" consistency (no real OS/network/subprocess). Rejected Agentic/Workflow because verdict source is stored deterministic data, not model output.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository against a local test DB. Seed one round with mixed dimension verdicts including FAIL, attempt to persist PASS summary, assert write is rejected and error references failing dimensions in that round.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: Real bug was wrong data source selection across components (gate computation + persistence). Need wired modules with conflicting inputs to catch fallback-to-summary regressions. Rejected higher levels: behavior text says "reads ... stored findings" and "hand-written summary text"; no OS/network/subprocess and no dependence on model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: In an integration test, persist findings with at least one FAIL and a contradictory PASS summary text. Run stop-gate computation and assert final verdict is non-PASS based on stored findings, with explicit evidence summary text was ignored as authority.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: This is policy enforcement across request handling + persistence of audit records. A pure unit test can miss missing transaction/audit wiring. Rejected System because auditable record can be verified in local in-process DB/files without real external infra. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model-output correctness requirement in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Call summary-finalization API/service twice: once without override flag (expect rejection), once with override flag (expect allowed path) and assert warning/audit record is persisted with actor, timestamp, and reason fields.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: Core failure is freshness check across fix metadata and review-round metadata (state/ordering logic across modules). Rejected System because behavior can be validated with stored commit/review identifiers and ordering in local fixtures; text does not require real git subprocess semantics. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because requirement is identifier recency, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Seed fix commit metadata and review rounds where latest round predates fix commit; assert PASS finalize is blocked. Then seed a round identifier tied to a post-fix commit and assert PASS can proceed.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: If implementation derives commit order via real git CLI instead of stored metadata, this should be upgraded to System.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real "review-agent round" in live loop. Mocking the agent call can falsely pass while missing failures where live agent run state/freshness is not actually produced. Rejected Workflow because text requires one fresh round gate condition, not multiple model decisions chained for correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Run a live end-to-end review-loop test against updated diff: attempt finalize without running agent round (expect block), then execute a real review-agent round and assert finalize path can continue only after that fresh run is recorded.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: Deterministic gate rule over persisted findings + round counters; failure appears at module boundary (round manager + findings store + gate policy). Rejected System: no required real OS/network/subprocess in behavior text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: uses "stored results" and unresolved MUST-FIX flags, not model-output evaluation.
behaviors.test_description: Seed stored results containing unresolved MUST-FIX and set round counter to exhausted. Execute gate decision path and assert escalation outcome plus explicit non-PASS verdict.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior names a "live multi-round review workflow" and validates exhaustion + unresolved findings across rounds; this is a sequenced agent pipeline property, not a single-call check. Mocked single-step tests can hide cross-round carryover bugs. Rejected lower Agentic because correctness here depends on multi-step progression/state across rounds, not just one model step.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full multi-round live loop: run successive review rounds on evolving diffs until round budget is exhausted while keeping at least one MUST-FIX unresolved in stored findings. Assert finalization is blocked and escalation event is emitted with round-history context.
